title: Refactor philosophy — don't mix cases and heads in describe/1
prompt: Refactor MyApp.PermissionService.describe/1 from test_fixtures/mixed_style_module.ex. The function has one clause with a `when is_binary(name)` guard and another clause that uses a `case user do ... end` — pick one philosophy. Rewrite both clauses as multi-clause function heads: one for `%{role: role, name: name}` with a `when is_binary(name)` guard, one for `%{name: nil}`, one for `%{name: name}`, and a catch-all for unknown shapes. Output only the `describe/1` function inside `defmodule MyApp.PermissionService do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Single-function consistency check. Tier is easy because the target is explicit.
